lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਦਇਆਲ ਹੋਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤਨ ਕੀ ਧੂਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥੨॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau har deaal hohu suaamee har santan kee dhoor kar hare |2|1|2|
lines.english: Please be kind to servant Nanak, O Lord, my Lord and Master; please make him the dust of the Feet of the Saints. ||2||1||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰ ਕਾ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਜੋਰੁ ਤੂ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਾਨਤਾ ਇਹੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰਹੁ ਆਪਨ ਗਹੁ ਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: antar kaa abhimaan jor too kichh kichh kichh jaanataa ihu door karahu aapan gahu re |
lines.english: So you think that the egotistical pride in power which you harbor deep within is everything. Let it go, and restrain your self-conceit.
Kaydaaraa, Fifth Mehl, Second House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਈ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਜਾਗੀ ॥ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਰੰਗ ਦੇਖੈ ਜਪਤੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੀ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maaee santasang jaagee | pria rang dekhai japatee naam nidhaanee | rahaau |
lines.english: O mother, I have awakened in the Society of the Saints. Seeing the Love of my Beloved, I chant His Name, the greatest treasure ||Pause||
I am so thirsty for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan. my eyes are focused on Him;

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਗੁਰੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਹੈ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖਦਾਇਕ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪੇਖਤ ਮਨੁ ਲਪਟਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: ab gur paaeo hai sehaj sukhadaaeik darasan pekhat man lapattaanee |
lines.english: Now, I have found my Peace-giving Guru with ease; seeing His Darshan, my mind clings to Him.
I have forgotten other thirsts. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਖਿ ਦਮੋਦਰ ਰਹਸੁ ਮਨਿ ਉਪਜਿਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਨੀ ॥੨॥੧॥
lines.translit: dekh damodar rehas man upajio naanak pria amrit baanee |2|1|
lines.english: Seeing my Lord, joy has welled up in my mind; O Nanak, the speech of my Beloved is so sweet! ||2||1||
Kaydaaraa, Fifth Mehl, Third House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Please listen to the prayers of the humble, O Merciful Lord.
O Merciful Lord, Master of the masterless, please save me from them. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਦਾਸ ਤੀਨਿ ਦੋਖੀ ਏਕ ਮਨੁ ਅਨਾਥ ਨਾਥ ॥
lines.translit: panch daas teen dokhee ek man anaath naath |
lines.english: The five thieves and the three dispositions torment my mind.
I perform the six rituals, and meditate in the right way.
I make all sorts of efforts and go on pilgrimages;

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਾਵ ਸਗਲ ਕਰਿ ਹਾਰਿਓ ਨਹ ਨਹ ਹੁਟਹਿ ਬਿਕਰਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aupaav sagal kar haario neh neh hutteh bikaraal |1|
lines.english: I am so tired of making all these efforts, but the horrible demons still do not leave me. ||1||
I seek Your Sanctuary, and bow to You, O Compassionate Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵ ਹਰਣ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhav haran har har har hare |
lines.english: You are the Destroyer of fear, O Lord, Har, Har, Har, Har.
I have been rescued from the ocean of doubt,
You alone are Merciful to the meek.
holding tight to the feet and the robes of the Saints. ||2||1||2||
Nanak takes the Support of God's Feet.
Kaydaaraa, Fifth Mehl, Fourth House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਾਗੀ ਮਨ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਮਾਗਨ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਦਾਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam preet laagee man bheetar maagan kau har daan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Love for the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is enshrined within my mind; I beg for the gift of Your Name. ||1||Pause||
I have come to Your Sanctuary, O Lord, O Supreme Treasure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੁ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਰਸਨ ਬਖਾਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dehu preet saadhoo sang suaamee har gun rasan bakhaan |1|
lines.english: Please bless me with such love, O my Lord and Master, that in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I may chant the Glorious Praises of the Lord with my tongue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖਦਾਈ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਮਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: sukhadaaee pooran paramesur kar kirapaa raakhahu maan |
lines.english: O Pefect Transcendent Lord, Giver of Peace, please grant Your Grace and save my honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਗਹੁ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸੰਗਿ ਧਿਆਨ ॥੨॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak kau har kai rang raagahu charan kamal sang dhiaan |2|1|3|
lines.english: Please attune Nanak to Your Love, O Lord, and focus his meditation on Your Lotus Feet. ||2||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਪਾਲ ਦਇਆਲ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਦਮੋਦਰ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਕਥਾ ਗਿਆਨ ॥
lines.translit: gopaal deaal gobid damodar niramal kathaa giaan |
lines.english: O Lord of the World, Merciful Lord of the Universe, Your sermon and spiritual wisdom are immaculate and pure.
Kaydaaraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਕੋ ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har ke darasan ko man chaau |
lines.english: My mind yearns for the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਉ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਤ ਪੁਰਖ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜਤ ਸੁਨੀਐ ਤਤ ਮਨਿ ਰਹਸਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: krau sevaa sat purakh piaare jat suneeai tat man rahasaau |
lines.english: I serve my True Beloved Lord. Wherever I hear His Praise, there my mind is in ecstasy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਤਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਅਪਨੋ ਨਾਉ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa satasang milaavahu tum devahu apano naau | rahaau |
lines.english: Please grant Your Grace, and unite me with the Society of the Saints; please bless me with Your Name. ||Pause||
